meta.title: Concepts for GitHub Actions
meta.intro: Learn the core concepts that you'll need to understand GitHub Actions.

body:
# Concepts for GitHub Actions

Learn the core concepts that you'll need to understand GitHub Actions.

## Links

* [Workflows and actions](/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions)

  Learn about the concepts of workflows and actions in GitHub Actions.

* [GitHub Actions Runners](/en/actions/concepts/runners)

  Learn about the concept of runners in GitHub Actions.

* [Security in GitHub Actions](/en/actions/concepts/security)

  Learn about security as a concept in GitHub Actions.

* [About GitHub Actions metrics](/en/actions/concepts/metrics)

  Learn about the GitHub Actions metrics available for your organizations and repositories.

* [Billing and usage](/en/actions/concepts/billing-and-usage)

  There are usage limits for GitHub Actions workflows. Usage charges apply to repositories that go beyond the amount of free minutes and storage for a repository.
